title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (during Update all)
scenario: During a 1-step DFU "Update All" process, updating the Charge Case with both earbuds placed inside causes the app to display a Houston screen instead of the expected behavior.
steps: Wait for the Charge Case to begin updating
Place both earbuds into the Charge Case
expected: The app should show the normal/expected DFU update screen or progress
